THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PO, TIN POR, TONG WONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONSECA, RICARDO FONSECA, CARMEN NUNU, JOHN ACANAS, CARLOS ACANAS, GLADYS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES WAS RESTORED ON 5/31/00 $9,179.73 RENT, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,074.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,678.73, LEASE FORFEITED, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF 1. $3914 IS FOR RICARDO FONSECA AND CARMEN FONSECA. 2. $3376.73 IS FOR JOHN NUNU 3. $1899 IS FOR CARLOS ACANAS AND GLADYS ACANAS.
